behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so statements can be attributed to attendees.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real speech-to-text diarization quality (an AI/ML output), not just local parsing. A mock STT response would hide real label-loss failures. Rejected Workflow: behavior text targets one model-stage outcome (speaker labels), not a multi-agentic chain requirement.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real multi-speaker meeting audio through the production STT API and assert transcript segments include stable speaker labels that map to distinct attendees across turns.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic parsing/mapping logic on transcript text and schema objects. The failure boundary is local function/object behavior; no real OS/network/model dependency is required.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser fixtures with explicit assignments (including edge phrasing) and assert extracted records contain correct assignee and task text fields in the summary-input structure.

behaviors.description: Live summary contains at least one action item for every attendee assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: This checks summary content completeness driven by real LLM decisions. Stubbed LLM outputs can always satisfy the rule and hide omission failures. Rejected Workflow: behavior text does not require validating multiple agentic handoffs; it can be tested with fixed transcript/task inputs and one real summarization step.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a transcript (or parsed assignment input) with tasks assigned to multiple attendees, call the real summarization model, and assert each assigned attendee appears in at least one action item.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` schema section, not generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Given already-identified decisions, this is local routing/schema-mapping logic. Real infra or model output is not required to expose misrouting bugs.
behaviors.test_description: Call decision-routing function with identified-decision inputs and assert outputs populate only `decisions` schema fields, with narrative fields unchanged.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in transcript appear in live summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: This depends on real LLM extraction/placement quality for decision content. Mock summaries hide failures where the model misses or misplaces decisions. Rejected Workflow: behavior text asserts one output property of the live summary, not explicitly a multi-agentic sequence requirement.
behaviors.test_description: Send transcripts with clear decision statements to the real summarization model and assert those decisions are present in the `decisions` section and absent from narrative-only placement.

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service splits into segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: This is a sequenced multi-stage pipeline (segment -> repeated model calls -> merge) where correctness depends on chained agentic outputs and handoff/state across steps. Single-step Agentic or Integration stubs can miss cross-segment coherence failures.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production segmentation and sequential processing, then verify merged output is single structured summary with cross-segment action items/decisions preserved and no segment-order loss.

behaviors.description: Full pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly targets end-to-end autonomous completion across upload, transcription, summarization, and delivery. It includes real infra plus multiple model-driven stages, so minimum boundary is full workflow.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the production pipeline on a real meeting audio file and assert successful unattended completion with delivered structured output containing expected top-level sections and valid schema.
